creator: kevin@bostoncrypto.com
text:
I have since updated to 9.1-RELEASE;  the problem building
gnupg-2.0.19_3 from the ports tree persists.
New environment string: "FreeBSD beastie 9.1-RELEASE FreeBSD 9.1-RELEASE
#3: Thu Jan  3 23:59:42 EST 2013    
kevin@beastie:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/CUSTOM  amd64"

I rolled back my port description to gnupg-2.0.19_2 and tried rebuilding
that version, and the build succeeded for the old version.
